assessment.note: She is still preoccupied with last cycle, which mildly signals unresolved growth blockage and lack of clarity about what happened.

new_queue.label: Last cycle thread
new_queue.name: When you think about last cycle, what still feels unresolved for you?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific unresolved part of last cycle that is still blocking forward movement.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Mentoring shape
new_queue.name: What would make the mentoring program feel like real growth work for you?
new_queue.description: Tests whether mentoring is strategically advancing her trajectory or just filling time.

new_queue.label: Commit next move
new_queue.name: What is the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific action or decision she is committing to before the next 1:1.
